test.notes: Contract suite passed, root node tests passed (131/131), and browser-use-discovery tests passed (69/69).

typecheck.notes: All listed JS entrypoints passed node --check syntax validation.

blockingIssues.description: The landed feature commit only hardened discovery webhook secret handling; the broader OAuth-session and local-service boundary hardening described by the feature was not landed, the new root regression tests remain untracked, and tests/oauth-session-storage-boundary.test.mjs still uses the placeholder literal "secret_token_123".

Cold-start discovery setup still bypasses onboarding for non-deep-link entry points because openDiscoverySetupWizard() hides onboarding and the starter-sheet-created flow calls it directly instead of deferring through pendingDiscoverySetup.

rejectedObservations.observation: Isolated-worktree validation still requires manually copying integrations/browser-use-discovery/state/worker-config.json.
Workers should cite feature-owned commits and include explicit manual browser evidence in handoffs.
The discovery_worker services manifest should encode webhook-auth setup directly.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous because the requirement depends on local secret-bearing configuration, and the POST-auth expectation is already documented in .factory/library/user-testing.md.

rejectedObservations.observation: The integration-refactor-worker skill should change because one worker skipped required context reads.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous and not clearly systemic; this review shows worker non-compliance more than a skill-definition gap.
